import numpy as np
import pandas as pd

def build_model_matrix(df, target_col):
    if "total_spend" in df.columns and "visits" in df.columns:
        safe_visits = df["visits"].replace(0, np.nan)
        df["spend_per_visit"] = (df["total_spend"] / safe_visits).fillna(0)

    if "income" in df.columns:
        df["log_income"] = np.log1p(df["income"])

    categorical_cols = df.select_dtypes(include=["object", "category"]).columns
    df = pd.get_dummies(df, columns=categorical_cols, drop_first=True)

    X = df.drop(columns=[target_col])
    y = df[target_col]
    return X, y
